inputDescription: Paste one or more public keys, import a .pub file, or drop in authorized_keys content.
inputPlaceholder: Paste an SSH public key or authorized_keys content…
inputHint: Supports OpenSSH public keys, authorized_keys options, and SSH2 public key blocks (RFC4716).
resultsDescription: Fingerprints are generated locally from the raw SSH public key blob.
resultsEmptyDescription: Paste a public key to calculate SHA-256 and MD5 fingerprints.
errorNoKeys: No valid SSH public keys were found.
errorReadFile: Could not read the selected file.
errorWebCryptoUnavailable: SHA-256 fingerprinting requires Web Crypto support.
